---
title: "Resume/CV"
---

<div class="paper-card">
<div class="paper-title">Academic Resume</div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zachary Thomas McDowell</div>
<div class="paper-date">University of Washington &ndash; Department of Political Science</div>
<a class="btn-pdf" href="academic_resume.pdf" target="_blank">&#8594; View PDF</a>
</div>

<div class="paper-card">
<div class="paper-title">Curriculum Vitae</div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zachary Thomas McDowell</div>
<div class="paper-date">University of Washington &ndash; Department of Political Science</div>
<a class="btn-pdf" href="academic CV.pdf" target="_blank">&#8594; View PDF</a>
</div>
